title: Find the right Claude model ID for your platform

body.goal: Use the correct model identifier when calling Claude from different cloud platforms
steps: Claude API (direct): use claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-6, or claude-haiku-4-5
AWS Bedrock: prefix with 'anthropic.' — e.g. anthropic.claude-opus-4-6-v1, anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6
GCP Vertex AI: same as Claude API IDs — claude-opus-4-6, claude-sonnet-4-6
Tip: Claude API also supports aliases (e.g. claude-opus-4-6) that auto-resolve to the latest version, so you don't need to track date-stamped IDs
